reasoning: The health potion sprite occupies approximately 2 tiles wide × 2.5 tiles tall in the scene (roughly 64×80px), which far exceeds the 32×32 player reference size. Consumables must be 50–75% of player size (target 16–24px). At ~2× the player footprint, the potion reads as a character-sized object rather than a collectible item, destroying the toy-diorama scale relationship. Perspective and pixel-art style are internally consistent, but the fundamental size violation is a hard fail for this category.
